sizing_rule.note: Derive optimal f from parametric distribution fit to historical trades (e.g., .02, 2.76, 0, 1.78 on 232 trades). Adjust bounding parameters to balance in-sample fitting with out-of-sample robustness. No specific f value given; requires empirical calculation from trade distribution.

source_rule_text: Use optimal f parameter derived from observed distribution of trades, adjusting bounding parameters to balance fitting accuracy with robustness for future trading performance.
